card_text:
KAT-Coder-Pro V2 is a comparative catalog entry for Kwaipilot.

Weekly tokens: 4.3B.
Context Window: 256,000 tokens.
Released: 2026-03-27.
Pricing: $0.3 per 1M input tokens and $1.2 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, coding, software engineering, agentic, function calling, long context.
